description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a dark, hipped roof and a white exterior, set on a rectangular green lawn. The front facade features a central entrance with a small covered porch supported by columns, flanked by symmetrically arranged windows. A paved driveway leads up to the house, with several parked cars visible, suggesting a residential setting. The windows are evenly spaced and rectangular, providing a balanced and orderly appearance. The roof is prominent and slopes gently on all sides, typical of a hip roof design. The overall structure is compact, with a clear, functional layout and a welcoming front approach.
description: A white, single-story bungalow with a dark hipped roof, central porch, and symmetrical windows, set on a green lawn with a driveway and parked cars.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central porch with columns, and symmetrical windows, with the driveway and cars in front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side wall, roof slope, and the driveway extending from the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with windows and the lawn, with the driveway and cars visible in the background.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side wall, roof slope, and the driveway with cars parked along it.
